summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlobalAgri Commodities website - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly

Homepage loads with hero carousel, stats, commodity cards, sustainability banner, value chain, partner carousel
Navigation works across all pages: Home, About, Commodities, Partners, Careers, Insights, Contact
All 4 job detail pages load correctly with slugs: risk-analyst-singapore, logistics-coordinator-dubai, business-development-manager-nairobi, senior-grains-trader
Job application forms work with success confirmation
Contact form submission works with success confirmation
Commodity cards navigation to detail pages
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
